post.subject: More credit!
post.body: On Saturday I had £10 credit On Sunday it had gone down to £8.50 On Monday I had £10.50 On Tuesday I had £9.00 On Wednesday I have £11.46 I have no idea why - but my phone credit has been increasing over the last few days and i have no idea why. I am not by any means complaing - but quite freaked out.
